title: Disable DBFS root and mounts workspace setting is GA
body: The workspace setting that allows workspace admins to disable access to the Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces is now generally available. See [Disable access to DBFS root and mounts in your existing Databricks workspace](/aws/en/dbfs/disable-dbfs-root-mounts).

ref_links.text: Disable access to DBFS root and mounts in your existing Databricks workspace
